metrics.trend: Audit #60 accepted by both repos (28th consecutive acceptance). QC implemented all 3 recommendations: dual Copilot metrics, stale dispatch detection, metrics update step. last_cycle.summary: Twenty-fourth audit cycle. Closed #60 (accepted by both repos, 28th consecutive acceptance — dual Copilot metrics, stale dispatch detection). Filed #62: QC coverage expansion dispatches building-block types that predictably fail standalone E2E, needs type classification before dispatch. Main at cycle 107 — systematic property gap auditing, SeekToAction PR #362 merged, PR #364 in progress. QC at session 159 — parity 60/88 (68%), 11 types merged, 12 more in-flight, QC-REPORT #160 filed for AggregateRating. Both repos NOT stalled — strong advancement.
